description: Apply the ChEMBL-derived common structural alerts filter to every molecule and write pass/status/reasons columns (renamed passes_common_alerts / common_alert_status).
rules: read-only — parses molecules and writes a results CSV; mutates nothing remote
INPUT may be .csv/.tsv (smiles column), .sdf, or .txt (one SMILES per line)
limitation: Requires the medchem + datamol + rdkit + pandas stack (Python >=3.9); when absent the porter degrades gracefully and writes a stub so governance still runs offline.
